query: SELECT page, section, contentKey, COUNT(*) as count FROM siteContent WHERE page = 'contact' GROUP BY page, section, contentKey HAVING count > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LjqDmVpjTdU4x3.f803f9e43b11 --database nfjRiEndnKWe5mynUDANL9 --execute SELECT page, section, contentKey, COUNT(*) as count FROM siteContent WHERE page = 'contact' GROUP BY page, section, contentKey HAVING count > 1;
